history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with messy dark hair, their face obscured by a smartphone held in their right hand, takes a mirror selfie. They are wearing a maroon polo shirt and off-white trousers. A black backpack is slung over their left shoulder. The setting appears to be inside an elevator, with brushed metal walls that reflect the bright fluorescent light overhead. The elevator doors are visible, as is a vent on the ceiling and a notice posted on the wall. The overall mood is casual and slightly candid, captured in a moment of self-documentation. The lighting is harsh and direct, creating strong reflections on the metallic surfaces. The color palette is dominated by muted grays, the dark maroon of the shirt, and the light off-white of the trousers.
